prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: mobile game key art, square splash illustration
Primary request: dark-fantasy evolution art for the Vavarda clicker at level 9, title Voice of the Storm
Scene/background: high spired ruin consumed by arcane lightning, storm vortex overhead, reality ripples around the character
Subject: central hooded archmage, more refined and sovereign, runic storm sigils orbiting the head and shoulders, commanding weather and void at once
Style/medium: premium dark-fantasy splash illustration, iconic and polished, readable for mobile game milestone art
Composition/framing: centered figure, square composition, sigils framing the torso and head without clutter
Lighting/mood: exalted, severe, overwhelming but controlled
Color palette: obsidian, deep violet, silver, flashes of white lightning
Materials/textures: rune armor, storm particles, magical haze, wet stone
Quality: high
Constraints: no text, no logo, no watermark, no frame, one character only
